mapper.insert: INSERT INTO financial_node_snapshot ( user_id, template_id, year, month, name, type, current_balance, monthly_amount, expected_annual_return ) SELECT t.user_id, t.id, #{year}, #{month}, t.name, t.type, 0, t.default_monthly_amount, t.default_expected_return FROM financial_node_template t WHERE t.user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

INSERT INTO flow_snapshot ( user_id, from_snapshot_id, to_snapshot_id, amount, year, month ) SELECT ft.user_id, fs_from.id, fs_to.id, ft.amount, #{year}, #{month} FROM flow_template ft JOIN financial_node_snapshot fs_from ON ft.from_template_id = fs_from.template_id AND fs_from.year = #{year} AND fs_from.month = #{month} JOIN financial_node_snapshot fs_to ON ft.to_template_id = fs_to.template_id AND fs_to.year = #{year} AND fs_to.month = #{month} WHERE ft.user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

INSERT INTO financial_node_snapshot ( user_id, template_id, year, month, name, type, current_balance, monthly_amount, expected_annual_return ) SELECT t.user_id, t.id, #{year}, #{month}, t.name, t.type, 0, t.default_monthly_amount, t.default_expected_return FROM financial_node_template t WHERE t.user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM financial_node_snapshot s WHERE s.user_id = t.user_id AND s.template_id = t.id AND s.year = #{year} AND s.month = #{month} )

INSERT INTO flow_snapshot ( user_id, from_snapshot_id, to_snapshot_id, amount, year, month ) SELECT ft.user_id, fs_from.id, fs_to.id, ft.amount, #{year}, #{month} FROM flow_template ft JOIN financial_node_snapshot fs_from ON ft.from_template_id = fs_from.template_id AND fs_from.year = #{year} AND fs_from.month = #{month} JOIN financial_node_snapshot fs_to ON ft.to_template_id = fs_to.template_id AND fs_to.year = #{year} AND fs_to.month = #{month} WHERE ft.user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM flow_snapshot s WHERE s.user_id = ft.user_id AND s.year = #{year} AND s.month = #{month} AND s.from_snapshot_id = fs_from.id AND s.to_snapshot_id = fs_to.id )
